summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Discord RP Game Master bot memory system upgrade. All new memory endpoints working correctly including structured memory events, scene memory, relationships, knowledge store, smart context retrieval, auto-event extraction, and auto-summarization. GM message-driven responses now use smart context instead of raw chat history. Frontend dashboard and all navigation working perfectly.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns welcome message
GET /api/bot/status includes player_characters count
POST /api/campaigns creates campaign with auto_create_channels field
PUT /api/campaigns/{id} can update auto_create_channels
POST /api/memory/events creates structured memory event
GET /api/memory/events lists memory events with filters (type, resolved)
PUT /api/memory/events/{id}/resolve marks event as resolved
GET /api/memory/scene-state returns current scene memory
PUT /api/memory/scene-state updates scene memory
POST /api/memory/relationships creates/updates relationship
GET /api/memory/relationships lists relationships with entity filter
POST /api/memory/knowledge adds knowledge entry (public)
POST /api/memory/knowledge adds GM-only knowledge entry
GET /api/memory/knowledge lists knowledge with visibility filter
POST /api/memory/smart-context returns focused context with stats
POST /api/memory/extract-events extracts structured events from narrative
POST /api/memory/auto-summarize generates structured scene summary
POST /api/memory/update-scene updates scene memory from narrative
POST /api/gm/message-driven uses smart context for GM response
Smart context includes: PCs (2), NPCs (0), unresolved events (2), relationships (1), knowledge entries (4), summaries (1)
GM knowledge marked gm_only appears in context as hidden
Event extraction from narrative creates 3 structured events (injury, item_lost, clue)
Auto-summarize creates structured data with summary, consequences, changes, hooks, mood
Scene update from narrative correctly updates location, tension, present NPCs
Message-driven GM references injury from memory (smart context working)
All existing GM engine features still working (campaign generation, character questions, relationships, opening scenes)
All existing CRUD operations working (campaigns, NPCs, lore, player characters, allowed players)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with campaign stats and recent events in German
Frontend: All navigation works (Dashboard, Campaigns, Characters, NPCs, Lore, Rules & Tone, Channels, Event Log)
Frontend: Event Log shows character changes and actions in German from memory system
Frontend: Campaigns page shows German campaign titles from LLM generation
Frontend: Rules & Tone page shows narrative tone configuration
Frontend: All pages load without errors and have proper navigation

success_percentage.integration: 100% (memory system fully integrated with GM responses)
